title: Test optimizer procedure on Blind Transfer
description: Run the current feedback alignment optimizer procedure for Suco - Home Improvement / Blind Transfer- AI with max_iterations=3, max_samples=200, days=90. Verify from direct CLI process output whether the new procedure version works before launching the remaining seven candidates.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting direct CLI optimizer test for Blind Transfer- AI. Parameters: scorecard=Suco - Home Improvement, score=Blind Transfer- AI, max_iterations=3, max_samples=200, days=90.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: First direct CLI run failed before baseline. Procedure ID: 9a1c84e4-69d6-4718-b3ab-c95cc83dfc6d. Task ID: 77ef6ea9-427d-4799-a7b8-2d2f1becffeb. Exact failure from CLI: Tool 'get_plexus_documentation' not found while loading optimizer cookbook at Lua execution line 1978. Investigating whether the procedure should call plexus.docs.get / execute_tactus instead or whether the direct CLI tool registry is missing this tool.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applied focused MCP bridge fix: after Tactus rebuilds toolset_registry, Plexus re-registers the bridged MCP aggregate and individual tool names. Added regression test test_execute_tactus_reapplies_mcp_bridge_after_toolset_initialization; focused pytest passed.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Second retry after MCP bridge patch still failed with missing get_plexus_documentation. Root cause is the optimizer YAML still depended on the legacy docs MCP tool, while the new direct CLI runtime exposes execute_tactus plus local primitives. Updated feedback_alignment_optimizer.yaml to load optimizer docs from local plexus/docs/*.md via File.read; YAML parse check passed; focused MCP bridge regression test still passes.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Paused optimizer run/fix path per user concern. User flagged that seeing legacy direct plexus_* tool calls likely means optimizer YAML regressed to older code. Investigating git history and current diffs before any further changes; do not build on potentially reverted optimizer code.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Correction: current checkout is bugfix/plx-77865f-procedure-dispatch-indicator, which is not the optimizer execute-Tactus branch. Pausing conclusions from this branch and inspecting feature/plx-07dc0d-execute-tactus-mcp-tool separately.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Restored workspace to correct integration branch feature/plx-07dc0d-execute-tactus-mcp-tool at origin tip 0cd1a5a6. Preserved latest optimizer YAML from branch tip (Tactus runtime with plexus.* module and rubric-memory/SME briefing code). Rejected old wrong-branch MCP bridge/doc-loading changes; stash backup remains at stash@{0}. Remaining local CLI change is Lua table serialization for procedure optimize output plus test.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Retry direct CLI run after score-editor normalization fix is materially healthier. Procedure 64c65f35-93f6-4823-a627-fde308d3d8c0 / task cbe744a9-7386-4558-a63d-8f1110ce2f82 completed baseline, accepted cycle 1 with version 0468b78a-7d19-41b9-a802-549ef9a6dd1d, AC1 0.638 -> 0.702 (+0.064), and moved into cycle 2/3.
